base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of projectile_fire_from_candle_rod — a effect_layer (spell_vfx) from 1986 legend of zelda. Candle-flame / rod-magic projectile — small flame animation, travels short distance then dissipates. Reveals hidden rooms + burns some bushes. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Candle-flame / rod-magic projectile — small flame animation, travels short distance then dissipates. Reveals hidden rooms + burns some bushes
